positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a celestial fox (kitsune) silhouette, sitting gracefully among crescent moons and stylized constellations. The fox should have sharp, defined lines and an ethereal glow. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical. Use deep indigo, cosmic teal, and vibrant gold accents against a charcoal background. The style should be vector art, line art, and woodcut print style combined, emphasizing clean silhouettes suitable for screen printing or DTG apparel transfer. High contrast, highly detailed, mystical, magical, ornamental, spiritual symbolism, graphic design.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, amateur, photorealism, bokeh, gradients, complex shadows, messy lines
